name: Cherry Cheesecake Tarts
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup drained chopped cherries (fresh or frozen)
recipeInstructions:
Almond pastry for tarts: Mix together flour, finely chopped almonds, sugar, and salt. Cut butter into the mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs.
Tarts: Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit. Press 1 tablespoon almond pastry into 2 tart pans with a diameter of 2-1/2 inches. Prick the pastry with a fork. Bake for 5-10 minutes or until lightly browned. Beat cream cheese and sugar together until smooth. Add egg, lemon juice, lemon peel, and almond extract, and blend well. Spoon 1 teaspoon of cherries over the pastry. Pour the cream cheese mixture over the cherries. Reduce the oven temperature to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Bake for an additional 12-15 minutes or until the cream cheese layer is set. Cool completely before removing from the tart pans. Top each tart with warmed apricot preserves.
